description: Shared Runner process exit codes for the PGP benchmark CLI contract (design.md, Runner CLI Contract). Single source of truth referenced by the Go_Runner, Java_Runner, and Python harness. Any code > 0 that is not 2, 3, or 4 denotes a generic operation failure (Req 5.3).

codes.name: SUCCESS
codes.meaning: Success. Includes runs where per-file correctness failures were recorded in the RunnerOutput JSON (the process itself completed normally).

codes.name: CHECKSUM_OR_VERSION_MISMATCH
codes.meaning: Key_Set/Test_Corpus checksum mismatch or version mismatch. Input did not match the reference; results must not enter statistics (Req 4.6, 2.5).

codes.name: CONFIG_ERROR
codes.meaning: Invalid config/command JSON (malformed, missing required fields, or out-of-range values) (Req 19.6).

codes.name: UNSUPPORTED_CRYPTO_PROFILE
codes.meaning: Requested crypto-profile (cipher/compression/pubAlg) is not supported by this Runner (Req 4.4, 18.5).

codes.name: OPERATION_FAILURE
codes.meaning: Generic operation failure. Canonical value is 1, but any code > 0 other than 2, 3, or 4 is treated as an operation failure (Req 5.3).
